name: Allen West
description: '''Allen West''' (born October 17, 1967) is an American musician who has been the guitarist for the [[death metal]] bands [[Massacre (metal band)|Massacre]], [[Obituary (band)|Obituary]], [[Six Feet Under (band)|Six Feet Under]], Lowbrow, Corpse Rot, and Southwicked. He is considered to be a pioneering figure of the death metal genre in the 1980s.
